question.text: In NSDL, CM Pool Account delivery-out to CM Delivery Account can be:

answer.text: Both automatic (generated by CC) and manual (initiated by CM)

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Both automatic (CC-generated based on obligations) and manual (CM-initiated) delivery-out from CM Pool are available. **The Trap:** 'Only automatic' misses the manual option available to CMs for non-standard situations. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VII covers CM account operations. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Automatic delivery-out by CC is the default efficient method. Manual is used for exceptions or when the CM wants to control the timing.
